name: Soreheim Proper
seasonal_change: Soreheim Proper coordinates seasonal burdens across the alliance, shifting quotas, bridge priority, and emergency production rather than suffering them evenly.
seasonal_effects: Soreheim Proper coordinates seasonal burdens across the alliance, shifting quotas, bridge priority, and emergency production rather than suffering them evenly.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
